steps.title: Solve the equation
steps.content: Two cases for $2|6x-1|=6x+9$. Case 1: $2(6x-1)=6x+9$ gives $x=11/6$. Case 2: $-2(6x-1)=6x+9$ gives $x=-7/18$. Both check valid.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $13/9,1.444$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $13/9,1.444$.
